name: tepna
description: Tepna — the -Dex suite (browser-native, 100%-local physiological analyzers). DEV-TOOLING MANIFEST ONLY: private + unpublished, declares NO runtime dependencies, ships nothing, fetched by nothing at runtime — the 100%-local / offline / single-file invariant is untouched (same contract as tsconfig.json / types.yml). It is the command spine that unifies the OWN-THE-BUILD tooling (tools/build.mjs) with the DEV-TOOLCHAIN legs (tsc, ESLint) and the gate runners under one `npm run` surface.
_version_note: This 0.0.0 is a placeholder, NOT the release identity. The canonical suite SemVer lives ONLY in suite.manifest.json (CONTROLLED-RELEASES-2026-07-05); do not conflate the two. Never hand-bump either — tools/release.mjs stamps suite.manifest.json from pending changes/*.md.
author: Michal Planicka

scripts.gen:lists: npm run gen:docs-ledger && npm run gen:changes
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run test:build-core && npm run build:check && npm run verify:manifest
